title: PixelPioneer
description: This new PixelPioneer Mod adds new items and new blocks, whether in Sapphire, Ruby and Emerald. And more.
body:
This new Pixelpioneer mod adds new items and new blocks, whether in Sapphire, Ruby and Emerald. And more.

This mod can be solo as in multiplayer.

I hope you like.

You can find my discord on the link below:
["(https://discord.gg/PwazxMb8)"]

And the github to the link below:
["(https://github.com/CelyanRbx/PixelPioneer)"]
